samples.xml_description:
<module id="freq_div">
    <description>Design a frequency divider that divides the input frequency by 50, 10, and 1.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal.</input>
        <output id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</output>
        <output id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</output>
        <output id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="CW">Clock width</param>
        <param id="CW_DIV_2">Clock width divided by 2</param>
        <param id="CW_DIV_10">Clock width divided by 10</param>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <item type="combinational_logic">
            <impl>
                <assign name="CLK_1">
                    <r>CLK_in</r> <operator>==</operator> <constant>1'b1</constant>
                </assign>
                <assign name="CLK_10">
                    <r>CLK_in</r> <operator>==</operator> <constant>1'b1</constant> <constant> && </constant> <r>count_10</r> <operator>==</operator> <constant>4'd4</constant>
                </assign>
            </impl>
        </item>
        <item type="sequential_logic">
            <impl>
                <if>
                    <expr>true</expr>
                    <do>
                        <assign name="CLK_50">
                            <r>CLK_50</r> <operator>==</operator> <constant>1'b1</constant>
                        </assign>
                    </do>
                    <else>
                        <assign name="CLK_50">
                            <r>CLK_50</r> <operator>=</operator> <r>CLK_50</r> <operator>^</operator> <constant>1'b1</constant>
                        </assign>
                    </else>
                </if>
            </impl>
        </item>
        <item type="sequential_logic">
            <impl>
                <if>
                    <expr>true</expr>
                    <do>
                        <assign name="CLK_10">
                            <r>CLK_10</r> <operator>==</operator> <constant>1'b1</constant>
                        </assign>
                    </do>
                    <else>
                        <assign name="CLK_10">
                            <r>count_10</r> <operator>==</operator> <constant>4'd4</constant> <constant> ? </constant> <constant>1'b1</constant> <operator>^</operator> <constant>1'b1</constant>
                        </assign>
                    </else>
                </if>
            </impl>
        </item>
    </logic_description>
    <task>
        <description>Implement a frequency divider by 50.</description>
        <input>
            <name>clk</name>
            <description>Input clock signal.</description>
        </input>
        <output>
            <name>div_2</name>
            <description>Output clock signal with a frequency of clk divided by 2.</description>
        </output>
        <impl>
            <assign name="CLK_50">
                <param>CW_DIV_2</param> <operator>=</operator> <param>CW_DIV_2</param> <operator>^</operator> <constant>1'b1</constant>
            </assign>
        </impl>
    </task>
</module>
